steps.title: Identify the intensity difference
steps.content: Winged kelp has moderate umami intensity; arame has high intensity.

steps.title: Find which choice compares them
steps.content: Choice C directly compares their intensities using the contrast word “Although” followed by “the latter's umami flavor is more intense.” The other three either introduce unrelated foods (A), treat both seaweeds as equivalent examples (B), or focus on their shared category without noting intensity differences (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
